texto: Relations are also like living things, they breath, grow and make our lives wonderful and happier by their fragrance. Don't press or crush their necks……! let them breath……! let them grow……!because if we are climbing a mountain, each step may get harder but we should keep going, because we know that the view will be very beautiful from the Top....!take good care of you and your relations...!
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a zia: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Relations are also like living things, they breath, grow and make our lives wonderful and happier…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que vida, love, positive-thinking pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de love e positive-thinking.

texto: Negativity an be negated through positivity only………so whatever the situation, always stay positive ………!!!Believe that You will never feel regret on this, moon will be there waiting for you………!!
explicacao: Citação de zia sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Negativity an be negated through positivity only………so whatever the situation, always stay positiv…” articula vida, negativity, positivity em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como negativity e positivity.

texto: A human is useless & nothing without good deeds and kindness same as a beautiful red rose is nothing & useless without fragrance.…Living without a good purpose is also same as a paper flower…!People say We will not live forever, but i say our purpose of life and deeds will decide for how much time we will live…! And it can be forever, forever………!
explicacao: Citação de zia sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “A human is useless & nothing without good deeds and kindness same as a beautiful red rose is noth…” articula vida, eternity, without em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como vida.

texto: Knowledge is life with wings but imagination is the soul of those wings..!

texto: Although she is far apart from me, but still we are living in the same air and under the same moon, when she breath i take her breath through the air to the core of my heart,i feel her,i smells her every moment…!
explicacao: Citação de zia sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Although she is far apart from me, but still we are living in the same air and under the same moo…” articula amor, eternity, esperanca em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como esperanca e love.
